metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Girish Attri

plugins.name: session-manager
plugins.description: List, search, and delete Claude Code sessions and all related data across projects. Supported platforms: macOS, Linux, Windows (WSL).

plugins.name: creating-docs
plugins.description: Structured process for creating and updating project documentation with reference-based notation, validation scripts, and quality checks.

plugins.name: session-chat
plugins.description: Peer-to-peer messaging, task dispatch, and cross-project context sharing between Claude sessions via tmux.
